---
title: "Peer Review Gesamtbericht"
subtitle: "Zusammenfassung aller Selbstbewertungen"
author: "`r params$project_title`"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%d. %B %Y')`"

output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    number_sections: false
    df_print: kable
    fig_caption: true
params:
  project_title: "Projekt"
  project_id: NULL
geometry: margin=0.8in
fontsize: 11pt
documentclass: article
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE, 
  message = FALSE, 
  warning = FALSE, 
  fig.width = 7, 
  fig.height = 5,
  fig.align = 'center'
)

library(knitr)

# Load lab info
if (file.exists("labinfo.csv")) {
  labinfo <- read.csv("labinfo.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, fileEncoding = "UTF-8")
} else {
  labinfo <- data.frame()
}

# Load responses for each topic
load_topic_responses <- function(filename) {
  if (file.exists(filename)) {
    read.csv(filename, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, fileEncoding = "UTF-8")
  } else {
    data.frame(
      Nutzer = character(0),
      Frage = character(0),
      Bewertung = character(0),
      Begründung = character(0),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }
}

fuehrung_responses <- load_topic_responses("fuehrung_responses.csv")
mitarbeitende_responses <- load_topic_responses("mitarbeitende_responses.csv")
pat_responses <- load_topic_responses("pat_responses.csv")
ein_responses <- load_topic_responses("ein_responses.csv")
qual_responses <- load_topic_responses("qual_responses.csv")

# Load statistics
load_stats <- function(filename) {
  if (file.exists(filename)) {
    read.csv(filename, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, fileEncoding = "UTF-8")
  } else {
    data.frame()
  }
}

fuehrung_stats <- load_stats("fuehrung_stats.csv")
mitarbeitende_stats <- load_stats("mitarbeitende_stats.csv")
pat_stats <- load_stats("pat_stats.csv")
ein_stats <- load_stats("ein_stats.csv")
qual_stats <- load_stats("qual_stats.csv")

# Table function for responses
create_response_table <- function(responses_df) {
  if (nrow(responses_df) > 0 && all(c("Nutzer", "Frage", "Bewertung", "Begründung") %in% names(responses_df))) {
    kable(
      responses_df[, c("Nutzer", "Frage", "Bewertung", "Begründung")],
      col.names = c("Nutzer", "Frage", "Bewertung", "Begründung"),
      align = c("l", "l", "c", "l")
    )
  } else {
    cat("\n*Keine Antworten vorhanden.*\n\n")
  }
}

# Table function for statistics
create_stats_table <- function(stats_df) {
  if (nrow(stats_df) > 0) {
    kable(
      stats_df,
      col.names = c("Frage", "Min", "Mittel", "Max"),
      align = c("l", "c", "c", "c"),
      digits = 2
    )
  } else {
    cat("\n*Keine Statistiken vorhanden.*\n\n")
  }
}
```

---

**Vertraulich – Nur für den internen Gebrauch**

---

\newpage

# Laborinformationen

```{r labinfo, results='asis'}
if (nrow(labinfo) > 0) {
  cat("\n")
  
  # Basic info
  if (!is.na(labinfo$lab_name) && labinfo$lab_name != "") {
    cat("**Laborname:** ", labinfo$lab_name, "\n\n")
  }
  
  # Address
  address_parts <- c()
  if (!is.na(labinfo$street) && labinfo$street != "") address_parts <- c(address_parts, labinfo$street)
  if (!is.na(labinfo$plz) && labinfo$plz != "") address_parts <- c(address_parts, labinfo$plz)
  if (!is.na(labinfo$city) && labinfo$city != "") address_parts <- c(address_parts, labinfo$city)
  if (!is.na(labinfo$country) && labinfo$country != "") address_parts <- c(address_parts, labinfo$country)
  
  if (length(address_parts) > 0) {
    cat("**Adresse:** ", paste(address_parts, collapse = ", "), "\n\n")
  }
  
  # Contact
  if (!is.na(labinfo$phone) && labinfo$phone != "") {
    cat("**Telefon:** ", labinfo$phone, "\n\n")
  }
  if (!is.na(labinfo$email) && labinfo$email != "") {
    cat("**Email:** ", labinfo$email, "\n\n")
  }
  if (!is.na(labinfo$website) && labinfo$website != "") {
    cat("**Website:** ", labinfo$website, "\n\n")
  }
  
  # Staff
  if (!is.na(labinfo$lab_director) && labinfo$lab_director != "") {
    cat("**Laborleiter:** ", labinfo$lab_director, "\n\n")
  }
  if (!is.na(labinfo$deputy) && labinfo$deputy != "") {
    cat("**Stellvertreter:** ", labinfo$deputy, "\n\n")
  }
  
  # Numbers
  staff_info <- c()
  if (!is.na(labinfo$num_employees) && labinfo$num_employees != "") {
    staff_info <- c(staff_info, paste("Mitarbeiter:", labinfo$num_employees))
  }
  if (!is.na(labinfo$num_doctors) && labinfo$num_doctors != "") {
    staff_info <- c(staff_info, paste("Ärzte:", labinfo$num_doctors))
  }
  if (!is.na(labinfo$num_mtl) && labinfo$num_mtl != "") {
    staff_info <- c(staff_info, paste("MTL:", labinfo$num_mtl))
  }
  
  if (length(staff_info) > 0) {
    cat("**Personal:** ", paste(staff_info, collapse = " | "), "\n\n")
  }
  
  # Certifications
  if (!is.na(labinfo$accreditation) && labinfo$accreditation != "") {
    cat("**Akkreditierung:** ", labinfo$accreditation, "\n\n")
  }
  if (!is.na(labinfo$certification) && labinfo$certification != "") {
    cat("**Zertifizierung:** ", labinfo$certification, "\n\n")
  }
  
} else {
  cat("\n*Keine Laborinformationen verfügbar.*\n\n")
}
```

\newpage

# Selbstbewertung - Zusammenfassung

## Führung

### Radarplot

```{r fuehrung-plot, echo=FALSE}
if (file.exists("plot_fuehrung.png")) {
  knitr::include_graphics("plot_fuehrung.png")
}
```

### Statistik (Min, Mittel, Max)

```{r fuehrung-stats, echo=FALSE}
create_stats_table(fuehrung_stats)
```

### Detaillierte Antworten

```{r fuehrung-responses, echo=FALSE}
create_response_table(fuehrung_responses)
```

\newpage

## Mitarbeitende

### Radarplot

```{r mit-plot, echo=FALSE}
if (file.exists("plot_mit.png")) {
  knitr::include_graphics("plot_mit.png")
}
```

### Statistik (Min, Mittel, Max)

```{r mit-stats, echo=FALSE}
create_stats_table(mitarbeitende_stats)
```

### Detaillierte Antworten

```{r mit-responses, echo=FALSE}
create_response_table(mitarbeitende_responses)
```

\newpage

## Patienten & Angehörige

### Radarplot

```{r pat-plot, echo=FALSE}
if (file.exists("plot_pat.png")) {
  knitr::include_graphics("plot_pat.png")
}
```

### Statistik (Min, Mittel, Max)

```{r pat-stats, echo=FALSE}
create_stats_table(pat_stats)
```

### Detaillierte Antworten

```{r pat-responses, echo=FALSE}
create_response_table(pat_responses)
```

\newpage

## Einsender & Kooperationspartner

### Radarplot

```{r ein-plot, echo=FALSE}
if (file.exists("plot_ein.png")) {
  knitr::include_graphics("plot_ein.png")
}
```

### Statistik (Min, Mittel, Max)

```{r ein-stats, echo=FALSE}
create_stats_table(ein_stats)
```

### Detaillierte Antworten

```{r ein-responses, echo=FALSE}
create_response_table(ein_responses)
```

\newpage

## Qualitätsindikatoren

### Radarplot

```{r qual-plot, echo=FALSE}
if (file.exists("plot_qual.png")) {
  knitr::include_graphics("plot_qual.png")
}
```

### Statistik (Min, Mittel, Max)

```{r qual-stats, echo=FALSE}
create_stats_table(qual_stats)
```

### Detaillierte Antworten

```{r qual-responses, echo=FALSE}
create_response_table(qual_responses)
```

---

\newpage

**Bericht erstellt am:** `r format(Sys.time(), '%d.%m.%Y um %H:%M Uhr')`
